scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres && concurrently -n frontend,backend -c green,blue "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "bash -lc 'until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d hostingqr >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; Migrations__RunOnStartup=true dotnet run --project backend/src/HostingQr.Api'"
